If successful, the flight will be a major step toward NASA’s goal of establishing a long-term presence on the lunar surface.
NASA’s efforts to return to the moon have been decades in the making — a process the agency has documented in images at every stage.

title: Some Alabama residents learn they haven't had fluoride in their water for years
summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, fluoride has not been added to most drinking water for at least two years, but the public was not notified.
story: Last week, residents of Birmingham, Alabama, were informed that their drinking water would no longer contain fluoride. Then came a twist: It turned out that their water utility had, without telling the public, actually stopped adding it years ago.

John Matson, a spokesperson for Central Alabama Water, which serves Birmingham and its surrounding suburbs, confirmed to NBC News that two of the utility’s four water filtration plants had temporarily stopped fluoridating in 2023, and a third had stopped in March 2024. The changes were made under prior leadership, he said, when the utility had a different name.
Matson said Central Alabama Water has found “no record” of the public being notified.
WBRC 6 News was first to report that fluoridation in Birmingham had been quietly halted as early as 2023.

The revelation came just days after the utility announced that as a new policy, it would not add fluoride to Birmingham’s drinking water moving forward. The decision was made based on “a comprehensive evaluation of safety, infrastructure and financial considerations,” Central Alabama Water said in a press release. It cited the high cost of maintaining and repairing its aging fluoridation systems, which it said would require more than $3.7 million.

Matson said the state’s departments of health and environmental management were immediately informed when fluoride first stopped being added to the water. The health department did not respond to a request for comment and the department of environmental management was not immediately available for comment.

The American Academy of Pediatrics and American Dental Association recommend adding fluoride to drinking water because it helps prevent cavities. Around 72% of people served by community water systems in the U.S. receive fluoridated water, according to the latest available data from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
But a growing number of public water systems have begun to consider removing fluoride from drinking water.

Top health officials in the Trump administration have warned, without substantive evidence, that fluoride can have harmful effects. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. said in 2024, before becoming the country’s health secretary, that fluoridation was associated with bone cancer, thyroid disease, IQ loss and neurodevelopmental disorders. Scientists, however, say there’s not enough data to demonstrate a link. According to the CDC, which Kennedy now oversees, the only documented health risks of fluoridation are cosmetic issues such as discolored tooth enamel.

A year ago, Utah became the first U.S. state to ban fluoride in public water systems. Florida followed suit. At least 21 states introduced bills in last year’s legislative sessions to ban fluoride from being added to community water systems, according to the bipartisan National Conference of State Legislatures.

Central Alabama Water said last week that removing fluoride from drinking water “allows customers and their health care providers to make more individualized decisions about fluoride use.” The utility added that “many customers now receive significant fluoride from toothpaste and other topical products like mouthwash.”

Matson said the removal of fluoride in 2023 and 2024 occurred when the Birmingham Water Works Board was the area’s water utility. It became Central Alabama Water last year and is “committed to being transparent with its customers,” he said.

However, in a Wednesday court filing in Jefferson County, Alabama, a former attorney for the Birmingham Water Works Board alleged that “the individuals most responsible for allowing the fluoride systems to fall into disrepair are now running CAW.”
Birmingham Mayor Randall Woodfin wrote in a Facebook post on Tuesday that some of the top leaders at Central Alabama Water worked for the previous board.

“Y’all can get the same energy I gave the prior board when you are not transparent and honest with the customers,” Woodfin said. “You are not just a public entity. This is our water we are talking about. Stop playing with us.”
Many public health experts say there is no adequate replacement for fluoride in drinking water.

“It certainly is true that fluoride-containing toothpaste is effective at preventing decay, but it’s not true that that alone justifies removing fluoride from our drinking water,” said Dr. Scott Tomar, head of the department of population oral health at the University of Illinois Chicago.
Tomar said stripping fluoride from the water in Birmingham has unnecessarily put residents at greater risk for cavities.
“It has probably put youngest children at the greatest risk, because that’s usually where we see it show up first when fluoridation stops,” he said.

title: Hannah Montana' fans get the best of both worlds, and baseball embraces technology: The news quiz
summary: An airplane and fire truck collide at LaGuardia, a gubernatorial debate gets canceled, and March Madness pulls off a few tricks.
story: An airplane and fire truck collide at LaGuardia, a gubernatorial debate gets canceled, and March Madness pulls off a few tricks. Test your knowledge of the week in news, and take last week’s quiz here.

title: A women's prison conceals a sinister secret: Staff sexual misconduct, accusers say
summary: Some employees at a federal prison in Bryan, Texas, which holds high-profile women including Ghislaine Maxwell, said they faced retaliation for reporting abuse.
story: This article was published in partnership with The Marshall Project, a nonprofit news organization covering the U.S. criminal justice system.

Tucked in a residential neighborhood of bungalows and crape myrtle trees, the federal women’s prison in Bryan, Texas, doesn’t look like a traditional lockup. The women live in dormitory-style rooms without doors. In khaki uniforms and boots, some of the country’s most high-profile prisoners move freely between buildings for meals, work programs and recreation.

But as sprawling and open as Federal Prison Camp Bryan appears, some women and staff whistleblowers say the minimum-security facility conceals a sinister secret: inescapable sexual misconduct, and punishments for those who try to report the abuse.

I’ve used these exfoliating pore pads every other night for about five months, and over time, they’ve made my skin softer and smoother, as well as visibly reduced pore size in my t-zone. The pads are soaked in a solution made with AHAs and BHAs, and they’re dual-sided: the textured side, which you use first, gently buffs away dead skin cells, and the soft side has a soothing effect. Medicube’s Zero Pore Pads come with tweezers to grab one at a time, and there’s a spot to store the tool in the jar’s lid.
Apple AirPods Pro 3 with Active Noise Cancellation

These noise-cancelling earbuds give you up to 8 hours of listening time, and they come with a charging case and eartips in five sizes so you can customize their fit. Apple says the AirPods are dust-, sweat- and water-resistant. Beyond using them to listen to music and take calls, the earbuds have a built-in sensor that tracks your heart rate and calories burned during workout. There’s also a hearing aid feature and a live-translation to communicate across languages.
Premier Protein Shakes

Each of these premade shakes has 30 grams of protein and no added sugar, plus they’re gluten-free, according to the brand. They’re shelf-stable before you open them, making them ideal for travel, and they come in numerous flavors, like chocolate, caramel and cookies and cream. You get 12 shakes in this pack.
LifePro Vibration Plate

A vibration plate can make workouts more challenging and temporarily increase blood flow to make you feel less stiff, according to experts we spoke to. If you’re interested in trying one, Lifepro’s is a popular model that comes with accessories like resistance bands and loop bands you can attach to the base. The vibration plate, which lets you choose from 99 speed levels and 9 optional preset programs, has a LED panel display you can control with the built-in buttons or included remote.
What are the best Amazon Big Spring Sale tech deals?
Apple AirTags (1st Generation) (4-Pack)

I put these little trackers on my keys and inside my luggage, everyday bag and wallet so I always know where they are. The AirTags seamlessly connect to Apple’s FindMy app, which shows you their location on a map and guides you toward them. You can also use the app to play a sound on the tracker’s built-in speaker. Each AirTag comes with a replaceable battery that lasts for over a year, according to the brand.
Amazon Kindle Colorsoft

Amazon’s Kindle is one of our favorite e-readers, and this model has a 7-inch color display, letting you see books’ covers, illustrations and graphics more clearly than you can in black and white. You can also highlight text in colors. The e-reader’s battery lasts for up to 8 weeks, according to the brand, and it’s water-resistant. You’re also able to adjust the display from white to amber depending on your environment.
Blink Video Doorbell

See, hear and speak to visitors with Blink’s Video Doorbell, which connects to an app you can livestream footage from. Its camera gives you a wide head-to-toe view of who or what is at your door, and with a subscription, the app also sends you real-time notifications. The Blink Video Doorbell runs off AAA batteries and it has a 2-year battery life.
What are the best Amazon Big Spring Sale skin care and beauty deals?
Neutrogena Makeup Remover Wipes

Neutrogena’s Makeup Remover Wipes are in my bag at all times, and I also travel with them and keep a pack at my desk. The soft, compostable, plant-based cloths are soaked in micellar water, which cleanses my skin while getting rid of makeup and sunscreen. They’re alcohol- and fragrance-free, and gentle enough for daily use, according to the brand.
L’Oreal Paris Revitalift Triple Power Moisturizer

L’Oreal Paris’ moisturizer is made with ingredients like retinol, hyaluronic acid and vitamin C to hydrate, firm and brighten skin, as well as reduce wrinkles over time, according to the brand. You can use it day and night on the face and neck. It’s noncomedogenic and has a lightweight, non-greasy feel.
Lumineux Teeth Whitening Strips

Quickly and conveniently brighten your smile at home with these teeth whitening strips. Instead of peroxide, they’re coated in plant-based ingredients like coconut and sage oils, lemon peel and dead sea salt that lift surface stains off of teeth while adding minerals back into them, according to the brand. This pack comes with enough strips for 21 30-minute treatments.
Olaplex No.4C Bond Maintenance Clarifying Deep Cleansing Shampoo

Olaplex recommends using this detox shampoo once a week (or more often if needed) to get rid of buildup on the scalp and to boost color vibrancy, shine and softness. The shampoo, which is compatible with all hair types, deeply cleanses and restores the hair and scalp without stripping either or causing dryness, and it’s safe for colored and chemically-treated hair.
Laifen Swift Hair Dryer

This lightweight, travel-friendly blow dryer has two speeds and four temperature settings, plus there’s a LED ring that changes color according to the temperature setting you’re using. The blow dryer comes with a magnetic nozzle that attaches to the tool’s head, and it’s quiet — the brand says you can even use it to dry pets’ hair after a bath.
What are the best Amazon Big Spring Sale home deals?
Bissell PowerClean FurGuard 280W Self-Standing Cordless Vacuum

Bissell makes some of our favorite cordless vacuums, and this one is specifically designed for homes with pets — it has an extra powerful motor, headlights that illuminate hidden hair and a self-cleaning brushroll. You can also convert the appliance, which stands up on its own and has a HEPA filtration system, into a handheld and high-reach vacuum with the included attachments. You get up to 50 minutes of cleaning time per charge, according to the brand, and can remove the battery to repower it. The vacuum comes with a 2-in-1 dusting brush/crevice tool and an upholstery tool that’s designed for pet hair removal.
Energizer AA Batteries

It’s always a good idea to stock up on batteries when they’re on sale — you never know when you might need them, and they’re an essential for any emergency kit. This pack comes with 32 AA alkaline batteries that last up to 10 years in storage, according to the brand.
Bona Multi-Surface Floor Premium Spray Mop

Clean hard floors like stone, tile, laminate and vinyl with this lightweight spray mop that’s easy to maneuver and carry around your home. It comes with an extra-large, reusable microfiber pad and has a refillable, removable cartridge you add solution to. There’s also a retractable hook on its handle to hang it from. You get one pack of Bona’s Hard-Surface Floor Cleaner Concentrate with your purchase to help you get started.
Glad ForceFlex Tall Kitchen Trash Bags

I’m a proponent of using Amazon’s Big Spring Sale to save on household essentials you constantly re-buy, like trash bags. This pack comes with 110 13-gallon bags that have drawstring closures. They’re multi-layered to resist punctures, leaks and tears, according to the brand, and scented to control odors.
Levoit Core 200S-P Air Purifier

Levoit’s quiet, compact air purifier has a 3-in-1 filter that helps reduce the presence of tiny particles like pollen, dust, odors and smoke in your space, according to the brand. It pairs with the brand’s app, letting you control it remotely, set schedules and monitor filter life. The appliance responds to voice commands, too.
What are the best Amazon Big Spring Sale kitchen deals?
Rubbermaid Brilliance Food Storage Containers

Store and reheat food inside these stackable, 3.2-cup glass containers. They come with leakproof lids that have secure latches on the sides, and there’s built-in vents so you can leave the lids on while microwaving your meal to prevent splatters. The containers are stain- and odor-resistant, and they’re safe to put in the microwave, freezer and dishwasher, according to the brand.
Stasher Bowls 3-Pack

I’ve lost count of how many reusable silicone Stasher bags I own at this point. I own every size and shape the brand makes, and I particularly like the bowls because they have a flat base — they stand up on their own, making them easier to fill with snacks, leftovers, produce and even toiletries when I’m traveling. You get three Stasher Bowls in this pack: They come in 1-, 2- and 4-cup sizes. Each bowl has an air-tight seal you pinch to close, and they’re dishwasher-, microwave- and oven-safe up to 425 degrees Fahrenheit, according to the brand. Frequently asked questions

There are numerous differences between Amazon Prime Day and Amazon's Big Spring Sale:

Access: Everyone has access to the Big Spring Sale, while only Prime members can shop during Prime Day.Timing: The Big Spring Sale is typically in March, while Prime Day is typically in July.Length: The Big Spring Sale is 7 days long, while Prime Day is usually between 2 and 4 days long.Types of products on sale: You may see some of the same products discounted during the Big Spring Sale and Prime Day. title: BTS Announces Venues for Latin America Dates for 2026 World Tour 'Arirang'
summary: BTS have revealed where they will be performing when the group kicks off the Latin America portion of their upcoming “BTS World Tour Arirang.”The group recently launched their epic return to the public eye after completing their South Korean military service last year.
story: BTS have revealed where they will be performing when the group kicks off the Latin America portion of their upcoming “BTS World Tour Arirang.”

The group recently launched their epic return to the public eye after completing their South Korean military service last year. They kicked off their new era with the arrival of their new album “Arirang” and their concert “BTS The Comeback Live | Arirang,” which was released on Netflix March 21. The concert was held from the historic Gwanghwamun in Seoul.

Then on March 27, BTS dropped a documentary, “BTS: The Return,” also streaming on Netflix, that shows RM, Jin, Jimin, V, Suga, J-Hope and Jung Kook preparing to sing new songs for their fans, Army, for the first time in years.

Those songs, and surely hits like “Dynamite,” “Permission to Dance” and “Butter,” will soon be performed live for fans all over the world on the “BTS World Tour Arirang,” which begins April 9 in Goyang, South Korea.

The massive global tour will span 34 regions and include more than 80 shows. BTS will make other stops in Asia, the United States and Europe before making their way to South America. While the group previously shared details for many stops, all the venue locations and ticket information for the Latin America leg were initially marked “TBD.”
On March 27, the group shared where exactly they will be playing when they travel to Latin America. Read on to see the venue details and to find out how to purchase tickets.
When Do Tickets for the 'BTS World Tour Arirang' Latin America Leg Go on Sale?
Army membership pre-sale tickets for the Latin America dates will be available starting Tuesday, April 7.
The general sale begins on Friday, April 10 at btsworldtourofficial.com.

title: How Much Does Netflix Cost Now? Streamer Just Raised Prices Again
summary: Netflix is raising the price of its platform across all of its subscription tiers by at least $1.
story: Netflix is raising the price of its platform across all of its subscription tiers by at least $1.
The service announced March 26 the new costs of its streaming plans, which will now start at $8.99 a month.
How Much Does Netflix Cost Now?
With the new price increase, Netflix's three streaming plans cost:

$8.99 a month for is standard with ads plan, up from $7.99.$19.99 for its commercial-free, standard plan, up from $17.99.$26.99 for its its premium plan, which allows users to watch on four devices at a time, 4K (Ultra HD) + HDR viewing, Netflix spatial audio and more, up from $24.99.
$8.99 a month for is standard with ads plan, up from $7.99.
$19.99 for its commercial-free, standard plan, up from $17.99.
$26.99 for its its premium plan, which allows users to watch on four devices at a time, 4K (Ultra HD) + HDR viewing, Netflix spatial audio and more, up from $24.99.

Both ad-free options also allow users to add extra members to the account that aren't part of the household. For the standard plan, subscribers can add one extra member for $7.99 with ads or $9.99 without ads.
For the premium plan, users can add two extra members for $7.99 each with ads or $9.99 each without ads.
Netflix members will continue to be charged monthly on the date they signed up. The new costs should take effect in the next billing cycle.

Netflix last raised its prices in January 2025. At the time, the company also introduced the ability to add people outside the household to the account for a fee after cracking down on password sharing in 2023.
Netflix previously hadn't increased the price of its ad-free standard plan since 2022, and the premium plan hadn't seen a cost increase since 2023.

Other streaming services have also increased prices in recent years. In December 2024, YouTube TV increased the price of its base plan by $10, making it $82.99 per month. In October 2025, Disney raised the price of Disney+ with ads and ad-free to $11.99 and $18.99, respectively. Hulu with ads also increased in price to $11.99. That same month, HBO Max increased its standard plan price by $1.50, to $18.49.

title: These Were the Last Words JFK Jr. Said to Flight Instructor Before Fatal Crash
summary: A flight instructor relayed the final words John F. Kennedy Jr. told him before his fatal plane crash. Here are the last words from JFK Jr according to his flight instructor.
story: John F. Kennedy Jr., his wife, Carolyn Bessette Kennedy, and her sister Lauren Bessette, died July 16, 1999, after a plane he was piloting crashed near Martha’s Vineyard.
The crash and the aftermath were covered in the March 26 finale of FX’s “Love Story,” which depicts the relationship between JFK Jr. and Bessette Kennedy.
Navy divers recovered the bodies of Kennedy, Bessette Kennedy and Bessette on July 21.

According to a report from the National Transportation Safety Board, the probable cause of the accident was "the pilot’s failure to maintain control of the airplane during a descent over water at night, which was a result of spatial disorientation."
"Factors in the accident were haze, and the dark night,” the NTSB continued in the report.

The flight took off from New Jersey’s Essex County Airport and was scheduled stop in Martha’s Vineyard before its ultimate destination of Hyannis, Massachusetts, where Kennedy and his wife were going to attend the wedding of his cousin, Rory Kennedy. That wedding would be postposed and she would ultimately get married in August 1999 in Athens.

A certified flight instructor (CFI) who flew with JFK Jr. between May 1998 and July 1999 said, per the report, “he would not have felt comfortable with the accident pilot conducting night flight operations on a route similar to the one flown on, and in weather conditions similar to those that existed on, the night of the accident.”
The CFI also spoke with Kennedy the day of the crash and shared his final sentiment.

“The CFI further stated that he had talked to the pilot on the day of the accident and offered to fly with him on the accident flight. He stated that the accident pilot replied that ‘he wanted to do it alone.’”

Kennedy, who passed his private pilot flight test on April 22, 1998, had flown about 72 hours without a CFI onboard, and had spent roughly 36 hours flying the Piper Saratoga — the plane that crashed that he also owned — with more than nine of those hours taking place at night. Three hours were without a CFI.
Kennedy had also flown 35 flight legs from the New Jersey airport to the Martha’s Vineyard/Hyannis area, 17 of those occurring without a CFI accompanying him.

title: All About the Plane Crash That Led to John F. Kennedy Jr.’s Death
summary: Why did JFK Jr's plane crash? :ook back at the event that ended the lives of John F. Kennedy Jr.; his wife, Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy; and his sister-in-law, Lauren Bessette.
story: John F. Kennedy Jr. died in a 1999 plane crash near Martha’s Vineyard that also claimed the life of his wife, Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy.

Now, over two decades later, their legacy has reached a new generation. Their story was the focus of “Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette,” a new series that aired on FX and Hulu in 2026.

Rosemarie Terenzio, who served as chief of staff for Kennedy Jr.’s political magazine, George, and is the co-author of the 2024 book “JFK JR: An Intimate Oral Biography,” said the couple captured the public’s imagination.

“Everybody wanted to be like them, and everybody wanted to be with them. There is just something about them, that classic never goes out of style,” she told TODAY in a segment that aired July 16, on the 26th anniversary of the couple’s death.
Kennedy Jr. and Bessette-Kennedy’s impact on the culture has endured, thanks to Instagram accounts that show photos of the couple and TikTok accounts that discuss their timeless style.

Jack Sehnert, who is the vice president of international design at Steve Madden, created an Instagram account about Bessette-Kennedy a decade ago. He says the public has developed a newfound appreciation for her.

“John has been famous since the day he was born,” he said on TODAY. “What I think has happened over the last couple of years is that the focus and the spotlight really is shifting over to — who is this woman who was the wife behind this incredibly storied man.”

“There was always this very, very strong line of simplicity and elegance that I think people are gravitating towards now, because it feels attainable, feels like something that we could all do,” he added.
The Ryan Murphy series, “Love Story,” is all part of the spotlight that continues to be shone on the couple.
“John would have rolled his eyes and said, ‘Oh, brother.’ And Carolyn, I think, would have been flattered and tickled,” Terenzio said of how they would have reacted to the series and continued fame.

Kennedy Jr. was regarded as American royalty. He was the son of the 35th president of the United States, and in the wake of his father’s assassination, he grew to be a symbol of hope, the heir apparent to a Camelot that was cut short.
In 1999, a plane piloted by the 38-year-old Kennedy Jr. crashed into the Atlantic Ocean, killing him, as well as Bessette-Kennedy and his sister-in-law, Lauren Bessette.
July 16 marks the grim anniversary of their deaths. But that day was only the beginning of a period of shock and uncertainty. Here, we take a look back at the events that surround the tragedy.

Kennedy Jr. made plans to attend the wedding of his cousin Rory Kennedy in Hyannis Port, Massachusetts, on July 17. However, according to several sources at the time, his wife was upset and didn’t want to accompany him.

In “The Kennedy Curse,” author Edward Klein claimed that was the reason why, on Thursday, July 15, Bessette-Kennedy’s sister offered to join the couple on the upcoming trip, at least as far as Martha’s Vineyard, where she intended to spend the weekend with friends.
RoseMarie Terenzio recalled that Bessette-Kennedy’s reluctance to attend the wedding continued on the day of the flight.

In her 2012 book, “Fairy Tale Interrupted: A Memoir of Life, Love, and Loss,” Terenzio explained that the 33-year-old, who’d been married to Kennedy for nearly three years at that point, had been feeling neglected by her husband.
“I’m not a priority,” Terenzio remembered Bessette-Kennedy telling her. “It’s always something else. George. Somebody getting fired. An event. A trip to Italy to meet advertisers.”
According to Terenzio, she’s the one who finally convinced Bessette-Kennedy to go anyway.

“I know, but now’s not the time to take a stand,” she told her. “His whole family is going to be at this wedding, and you need to go with him. ... You don’t want to put John in a position where he has to explain where you are, and you don’t want to put yourself in a position of being judged. You get enough of that.”

That night, Bessette-Kennedy and her sister joined JFK Jr. in his single-engine Piper Saratoga, and at 8:38 p.m., they departed from New Jersey’s Essex County Airport. Though it would be some time before anyone knew for certain, approximately an hour later, the plane crashed into the Atlantic Ocean.

In the early hours of Saturday morning, CNN reported that Kennedy’s family contacted the Coast Guard to report that his plane never arrived. Search and rescue efforts began before daylight, but by day’s end, hope was fading.
Debris from the flight was found about 200 yards off the coast of Martha’s Vineyard, along with Lauren Bessette’s suitcase.
“There is always hope,” Coast Guard Lt. Gary Jones said, according to The Washington Post. “But unfortunately, when you find certain pieces of evidence, you have to be prepared for anything.”
Rory Kennedy’s wedding was postponed. She ended up getting married in Athens in August 1999.
On Sunday, as search efforts moved from rescue to recovery, Present Bill Clinton addressed the nation.

“As the search continues, I want to express our family’s support and offer our prayers and those of all Americans for John Kennedy Jr.; his wife, Carolyn; her sister, Lauren; and to their fine families,” he said from the lawn of the White House.

He added, “For more than 40 years now, the Kennedy family has inspired Americans to public service, strengthened our faith in the future and moved our nation forward. Through it all, they have suffered much and given more.”
Several vessels, including the sonar-equipped National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration’s survey ship NOAAS Rude, launched underwater searches for the wreckage of the plane, per CNN.
The plane’s fuselage was discovered at a depth of more than 100 feet, per CNN.
Search efforts ended on Wednesday, July 21, as Navy divers recovered the bodies of JFK Jr., Bessette-Kennedy and Bessette from the shattered fuselage.
Autopsies, which were conducted that evening, revealed that all three died on impact.
On Thursday, the Kennedy and Bessette families gathered aboard the Navy destroyer USS Briscoe for a burial at sea near the recovery site, the Post reported.
A mass was held in honor of Kennedy Jr. at New York City’s Church of St. Thomas one week after his final flight. He was eulogized by his uncle Sen. Edward M. Kennedy.

“We thank the millions who have rained blossoms down on John’s memory,” the senator said, according to the John F. Kennedy Presidential Library and Museum. “He and his bride have gone to be with his mother and father, where there will never be an end to love. He was lost on that troubled night, but we will always wake for him, so that his time, which was not doubled, but cut in half, will live forever in our memory, and in our beguiled and broken hearts.”
He added, “We dared to think ... that this John Kennedy would live to comb gray hair, with his beloved Carolyn by his side. But like his father, he had every gift but length of years.”
July 6, 2000

Nearly one year after the crash, the Post reported that the National Transportation Safety Board determined the crash was likely caused by Kennedy’s “failure to maintain control of the airplane during a descent over water at night, which was a result of spatial disorientation.”
The NTSB added, “Factors in the accident were haze, and the dark night.”
The biggest loss: what could have been
JFK Jr. was an ambitious man with goals, both politically and socially, far broader than any he’d realized by the time of his death.
“His legacy was really about who he would’ve become,” Brian Steel, his longtime friend, said in 2020. “I just think America, and maybe the world, would have been a better place.”

title: Will There Be a 'Love Story' Season 2? Creator Names Famous Couple with the 'Right Intensity'
summary: Will there be another season of "Love Story"? the show's creator said this famous couple has the "right intensity" to be the subject of the anthology series.
story: Now that FX's hit series "Love Story" is officially over, fans have one burning question on their minds: Will there be another season?
The nine-episode show, which relived John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette’s relationship, aired its last episode on March 26. As many viewers know, their story ends tragically.

"Love Story: John F. Kennedy and Carolyn Bessette" is described as the first installment of a new anthology series from Ryan Murphy, who also produced series like "American Crime Story," which has spotlighted the trial of O.J. Simpson and the assassination of Gianni Versace.
While a second installment of "Love Story" has not been announced, creator Connor Hines is already thinking of future inspirations.
In an interview with Vanity Fair, Hines reflected on the success of the series, saying, "It’s exactly as I pictured it in my mind when I was writing it."
Hines also cited one couple's story to potentially dramatize next.
"Maybe Elizabeth Taylor and Richard Burton," Hines said. "They have the right intensity."
The two actors had a tumultous on-again, off-again relationship and were married twice, between 1964-1974 and 1975-1976.
Since its premiere on Feb. 12,"Love Story" has become a cultural sensation and piqued the curiosity of a new generation about the couple's New York, '90s romance.

In March, "Love Story" set a record by becoming FX's most-watched limited series ever on Hulu and Disney+. At the time, only five episodes had been released and streamed more than 25 million hours since its premiere.
The limited series followed Kennedy and Bessette from the early days of their relationship to their tragic deaths.

The series has also sparked some criticism, despite the show's warning before each episode that “certain depictions of people and events have been dramatized or fictionalized for storytelling purposes." Actor Daryl Hannah, who previously dated Kennedy, wrote in a New York Times op-ed that her portrayal in "Love Story" was "not even a remotely accurate representation of my life, my conduct or my relationship with John.”
Jack Schlossberg, Caroline Kennedy's son and JFK Jr.'s nephew, has called the show a “grotesque display of someone else’s life.”
"Love Story" didn't shy away from sharing the highs and lows of Kennedy and Bessette's at-times tumultuous relationship, including their famous explosive fight in a New York City park.

Elizabeth Beller, the author of “Once Upon a Time: The Captivating Life of Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy,” which inspired "Love Story," opened up about the couple's relationship dynamic in a recent interview with TODAY.com.

“I think it’s two people who loved each other very much and had a lot on their plates,” Beller said. “Young marriages need time, and they had so many pressures on them, and then you add the public eye and a constant paparazzi. It just creates a pressure cooker.”
Since the couple's lives were highly publicized by paparazzi, both the positive and negative moments of their relationship became tabloid fodder at times.

“I land on — they really loved each other, but there were realities that made things very difficult,” Beller said. “I don’t know any couple … if you don’t fight, you’re not living in the same house. So even if they fought and there was turmoil, that does not mean there was not a deep love.”

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Turn the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards Into Date Night: See Their Sweetest Moments
summary: Taylor Swift is turning the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards into a date night, with fiancé Travis Kelce by her side.
story: Taylor Swift is turning the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Awards into a date night, with fiancé Travis Kelce by her side.

About 20 minutes before the ceremony began on Thursday, March 26, iHeartRadio posted on its X account that the Kansas City Chiefs star was attending the show and making his way to his seat. IHeartRadio uploaded a video of Kelce walking through the hallway of the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, where the award show is being held.
A few minutes later, Swift was then filmed waving to fans as she entered the historic auditorium.
Although they arrived separately, the two met up inside, marking their first time attending an award show together.

As host Ludacris welcomed the audience and viewers to the ceremony, he mentioned in his opening monologue that this was the pop icon’s third time attending the iHeartRadio Music Awards, which honors the most-played artists and songs on iHeartRadio stations and app of the past year.

After saying her name, cameras cut to Swift, who delivered a wink and a wave to the camera before turning to smile at the person next her. When Ludacris made his way through the crowd of stars in the first row, it was revealed that Kelce was the mystery person seated beside her.
IHeartRadio quickly shared a clip of the couple on X, writing, “Tayvis looking stunning as ever!!”
As the night continued, the “The Fate of Ophelia” singer and the NFL star posed for the camera. In one sweet snap they lovingly looked at each other.

The singer won pop album of the year for “The Life of a Showgirl,” which was released in October 2025. After Raye announced her as the winner, Swift stood and quickly shared a kiss with Kelce before taking the stage.
During her speech she spoke about writing her latest album and took a moment to give the NFL player a loving shout out.
“This album probably also feels very happy and confident and free because that’s the way that I get to feel every single day of my life because of my fiancé, who is here tonight,” she said.
“So thanks for all the vibes,” she added as the crowd applauded. Kelce was also seen saying, “I love you” while Swift was onstage.
The pair, who have been dating since 2023, announced their engagement in August 2025.
During Raye’s performance of “Where Is My Husband,” the two shared another sweet moment when Swift was seen hugging her soon-to-be husband and mouthing the lyrics to him.
Swifties couldn’t get enough of the couple. For this special occasion, they celebrated seeing Swift and Kelce together and also shared videos on social media of them inside the Dolby Theatre.
In one clip, the two greeted musician Sombr.
Another showed them holding hands.
One X user wrote about the couple, “Taylor and Travis look AMAZING.”
A second Swiftie said, “I think no one’s ready for the amount of Taylor and Travis content we’re gonna have tonight, buckle up, sisters, ‘cause we’re taking off.”
Since releasing her latest album, Swift has been laying low and hasn’t attended many Hollywood events. Some wondered if Swift had a special announcement up her sleeve.
“Taylor and Travis at the awards show, I’m even scared of the surprises,” one tweeted.

While there were no surprises, Swift did end the night with a total of seven iHeartRadio Music Awards, including artist of the year. She took the stage once again, thanking Olympic ice skater Alysa Liu for presenting the awards to her. She also spoke about her love of music and honing her craft as a singer-songwriter.
She encouraged the audience to pursue their hobbies and passions, like she did from a young age.

“I am a firm believer that anything you feed your mind, it will internalize. Anything you feed the internet, it will attempt to kill. And I don’t want that for your dreams,” she told the crowd as she concluded her final speech of the night.

title: Taylor Lautner and Wife Tay Announce They're Expecting Their 1st Child
summary: Taylor Lautner and his wife, also named Taylor Lautner, are adding another Lautner to the family
story: Taylor Lautner and his wife, also named Taylor Lautner, are adding another Lautner to the family!
The couple announced in a joint Instagram post March 26 that they are expecting their first child together.

The “Twilight” star and his wife, who goes by Tay and whom he has been married to since 2022, uploaded a series of pictures that showed them taking turns holding a roll of ultrasound photos in a grassy field.

In the first snap, Taylor Lautner kissed his wife’s growing baby bump. Another showed them holding hands as she cradled her bump. Others showed the two lying in the field as they laughed and sweetly stared into each other’s eyes.
“What’s better than two Taylor Lautners?” they cheekily asked in the caption and included a white heart.
Famous friends and “Twilight” alums filled the comments with congratulatory messages.
Former “Twilight” co-star Nikki Reed commented, “Oh my goodness (red heart emoji) heart bursting. I love you guys. I can’t wait to watch your journey as parents unfold…”
Taylor Lautner replied to her, “Love you niks.”
Fellow “Twilight” actor Peter Facinelli said, “Whaaaat? Amazing. Congrats. love you guys.”
Taylor Lautner responded, “Love you!!!!!”
Kellan Lutz, who portrayed Emmett Cullen in the hit film saga, wrote, “Congrats brother! It’s the best!”
Dylan Efron cheered, “3 Taylor’s!!!!”
“Bachelor” star Joey Graziadei wrote, “YOU GUYS ARE GOING TO BE THE BEST PARENTS!!!!” with four red hearts.
The parents-to-be tied the knot in November 2022 at Epoch Estate Winery outside of Paso Robles, California, in front of 100 family members and friends, Vogue reported at the time.

They now co-host the “Squeeze” podcast, where they interview celebrities and discuss mental health. When they are not recording a new episode, they are frequently gushing about each other on social media. On March 16, Taylor Lautner wished his wife a happy birthday.
“My ride or die for life. Happy birthday bubs @taylautner,” he captioned a carousel of photos showing romantic moments they have shared during their relationship.
In response, his wife commented, “Ugh you’re my favorite person ever.”

title: 'Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen' Ending: Who Lives, Who Dies and About That Curse
summary: What happens in the end of Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen? Does Rachel die? Who else dies? What is the curse?
story: Cold feet before a wedding is one thing. Immense dread? That’s another — and that’s what the bride in the new Netflix series “Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen” experiences in the lead-up to her big day.
The show takes place over the course of a week and follows Rachel (Camila Morrone) and Nicky (Adam DiMarco), an engaged couple preparing to get married.

In Episode 1, Rachel and Nicky travel to visit Nicky’s family before the wedding. At the end of the episode, Rachel stumbles upon an invitation to her nuptials and finds the following ominous message: “Don’t marry him.”
More creepiness ensues over the course of the next few days, then Rachel learns that her family is cursed.
What happens in the end? Why is Rachel cursed? And who dies in the finale? Here’s everything you need to know.
What Is Rachel’s Family Curse?

A mysterious man known as the Witness (Zlatko Burić) asked Rachel, "Are you sure he's the one?" Turns out that question is of grave importance for Rachel: She's cursed and her life, and the lives of her fiancé's family, hinge on the answer to that question.
In Episode 4, she visits the Witness and he breaks down her family's curse for her.
As the Witness explains, Rachel must marry her soulmate by sundown on her wedding day. There are a few other outcomes.
If Nicky isn't her soulmate, she will die.
If Nicky is her soulmate, she will live.
If she chooses not to go through with the wedding, she will die and the curse will transfer to Nicky and his family.

The curse dates back many generations to a woman who made a deal with death to bring back the man she loved, who had died. Death agreed to the deal, as long as the woman believed the man was her soulmate. Death then cursed her children to carry the same burden: find their soulmate and marry them or die.
Who Is the Witness?

The Witness, played by Zlatko Buric, sheds some light on Rachel's family curse for her. He explains that the curse was passed down in his family. One day, a mysterious man walked up to him and warned him about it. Scared that he might die if his bride wasn't his soulmate, the Witness left her at the altar.
In return, the curse was passed onto the bride's family and the Witness was cursed to witness the weddings of all the members of her bloodline.
Who Is the Sorry Man?
Rachel and Nicky's families are connected in an unexpected way, going back to the day of her parents' wedding, her mother's death and her own birth (same day!).

In Episode 4, Rachel’s father shows her a twisted home movie that he shot with her mother (Victoria Pedretti) on their wedding day. After getting married, her mother, who was pregnant with Rachel at the time, started bleeding profusely and died. Rachel’s father then tore Rachel out of her mother’s stomach.
(The Witness appeared in the wedding video of Rachel’s parents. When she spoke to him in a bar days before her wedding, Rachel noted that he hadn’t aged a day since.)

Coincidentally enough, Nicky’s brother Jules was near the cabin where Rachel’s mother died. The cabin was near Jules and Nicky’s family home. He watched Rachel’s father tear out his child, apologize repeatedly. This led to the creation of a figure he called the “Sorry Man” (who was actually Rachel’s dad).

In the present day, Rachel’s father (Josh Hamilton) has an intervention with her. Originally not invited to the wedding, he finds Rachel and tells her the truth. He thinks Rachel will die if she goes through with her wedding and wrote the message “don’t marry him” on the wedding invitation she found earlier in the series.
Is There a Way Out of the Curse?
Yes — a potion. Rachel learns through her family tree that one ancestor survived the curse. But it takes an intense potion involving her toe among other ingredients.

This potion will turn her into Nicky's soulmate. She makes the potion but ends up not taking it, not wanting to change herself, or lose herself, for marriage. Instead, she puts her faith in their connection.
What's Up with the Cunningham Family?

Look – both sides of this wedding party have secrets. Nicky's family is acting oddly because it turns out matriarch Victoria (Jennifer Jason Leigh) is dying and they're keeping it a secret from Nicky and Rachel. This explains their cagey behavior.
What Happens at the Wedding?
In the finale, Rachel is ready to say "I do" to Nicky, but he shocks her by saying no at the altar.

After hearing of his mother's affair, he insists that marriage has been a "poison" in his family. He feels like he pressured her into getting married when she didn't want to. He'd rather just stay together.

Rachel rushes away from the altar and the couple locks themselves in a room to hash things out. Rachel questions why Nicky is doing this since he's aware that she's cursed and will die. Even though he previously told her he believed her, he now says he doesn't believe in the curse.

As the clock ticks and sundown approaches, the stakes get higher. Nicky's family pressures him to marry Rachel since the curse will spread to their family if he doesn't. He eventually agrees to go through with the wedding, with minutes to spare.
But, plot twist, Rachel says she won't marry him now because she won't die for him.
Soon, wedding guests and members of Nicky's family start bleeding from their orifices, just like Rachel's mother did right before she died.
Nicky finds Rachel and tells her he now believes the curse is real. Since she previously said her vows, Nicky is able to complete the wedding by saying his vows. They are now officially married.
Who Lives and Who Dies in the Finale?

Many. people seem to be affected by the curse. Rachel runs to the Witness and asks why he didn't tell her this would happen. He says he did warn her and said it would spread to Nicky's whole bloodline. In other words, anyone who isn't married to their soulmate will die.
Rachel feels betrayed then starts bleeding from her nose since she and Nicky aren’t soulmates after all.
Portia and Victoria, not married to their soulmates, die, as do others in the wedding.
Jules, who was in the process of getting a divorce from his wife Nell (Karla Crome), survives, as does his son Jude (Sawyer Fraser).
Nicky is the only other member of the family to survive, implying that he thought he and Rachel were soulmates.
Does Rachel Survive in the End?
Rachel goes outside while she’s bleeding out and dies. When death comes for the Witness, however, Rachel comes back to life and takes his place.

Rachel runs into Jude in the hall and comforts him after the majority of his family just died. She also warns him to be very careful about who he marries one day and says she will witness the marriage.
Afterwards, she finds the Witness' dead body and a note he wrote in blood that reads: "Your turn!"
Rachel leaves the carnage behind and drives away in the final scene of the series.

title: There's a New Lord of the Rings Movie in the Works Thanks to Stephen Colbert
summary: Stephen Colbert is headed to the Shire, developing a new "Lord of the Rings" movie. Here is everything you need to know, including what it will be about.
story: Stephen Colbert is headed to the Shire.

The late-night talk show host will soon be ending his run on “The Late Show,” but his next big gig just might be his dream job. The Emmy winner has been tapped to write a new “Lord of the Rings” film.

Colbert is a lifelong J.R.R. Tolkien fan, and isn't shy about expressing how he believes “there is no better film series” than “The Lord of the Rings,” calling it “the greatest film trilogy in movie history.”

On March 24, franchise director and Oscar winner Peter Jackson gave an update on the forthcoming film, “The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum,” directed and starring Andy Serkis, best known as the titular character. He then brought in Colbert to announce a second film in the works and shared what the story will be about.
Read on to learn everything about Stephen Colbert’s new “Lord of the Rings” movie.
What Will the New 'Lord of the Rings' Movie Be About?

According to Colbert, inspiration for the film, tentatively titled, “The Lord of the Rings: Shadow of the Past,” came from his love of the six chapters that were omitted from the first film, “Fellowship of the Ring.”

“The chapter is ‘Three Is Company’ through ‘Fog on the Barrow-Downs,’” he said in the video with Jackson, sharing how he wanted to create something “completely faithful to the books while also being completely faithful to the movies.”

According to the official synopsis for “The Lord of the Rings: Shadow of the Past,” the story begins “14 years after the passing of Frodo” when “Sam, Merry and Pippin set out to retrace the first steps of their adventure. Meanwhile, Sam’s daughter, Elanor, has discovered a long-buried secret and is determined to uncover why the War of the Ring was very nearly lost before it even began.”
Working with Warner Bros. Pictures and New Line Cinema, Colbert will co-write alongside Philippa Boyens, who worked on the past “Lord of the Rings” and “The Hobbit” franchises, and Peter McGee.
Who Has Been Cast in Stephen Colbert's 'Lord of the Rings' Movie?
No cast members have been announced at this time. Colbert and Jackson did not share if any past actors would be reprising their roles.
When Will Stephen Colbert's 'Lord of the Rings' Movie Come Out?
At this time there is no release date. “The Lord of the Rings: Shadow of the Past” is currently in pre-production.
What Other 'Lord of the Rings' Films Are in the Works?
At this time, there is one other “Lord of the Rings” film in the works. Serkis, who portrayed Gollum, in the franchise is directing and starring in “The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum.”
The film is expected to be released in December 2027.
How Many 'Lord of the Rings' Films Are There?

There are six films in “The Lord of the Rings” franchise, beginning with 2001’s “The Fellowship of the Ring,” followed by 2002’s “The Two Towers” and the best picture Oscar winner “The Return of the King,” released in 2003.

Then there is “The Hobbit” trilogy, which serve as prequels. “The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey” was released in 2012, followed by 2013’s “The Desolation of Smaug” and 2014’s “The Battle of the Five Armies.”

Prime Video also developed and released a prequel series, “The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power,” in 2022. Confirmed for a third season, the show is set thousands of years before the events of “The Hobbit” and “The Lord of the Rings” books.

title: Rosalía Shares a Hospital Pic After Being 'Extremely Sick,' Walking Offstage Early
summary: Spanish singer Rosalía had to leave a concert in Milan on March 25 because she wasn’t feeling well. Here's what happened.
story: Spanish singer Rosalía had to leave a concert in Milan on March 25 because she wasn’t feeling well.

“I tried to do this show since the very beginning. I’ve been sick,” she said in a video captured by a fan. “I’ve had come up big time food poisoning and I’ve tried to push it ‘til the end, but I’m feeling extremely sick. I’m puking out there. I really want to give the best show, and I’m, like, on the floor, doing my best.”
The singer, who is in the middle of her “Lux Tour,” went on to say would try to “keep going, but maybe, at some point, I have to stop.”
She then grabbed her stomach while the audience cheered before the clip cut to another moment.
“I’m really trying. I’m going to push as much as I can, but, if we have to stop, we might have to stop if really physically I can’t keep going. I’m in pain,” she said.
The video then cut to the “Con Altura” hitmaker blowing a kiss and waving as she appeared to walk off the stage.
Rosalía posted a photo on her Instagram story March 26 with her on a stretcher holding an IV bag, while a needle was in her left arm and she gave a thumbs up sign.
“Feeling better,” she captioned the picture. “Thank you so much for all the love and understanding from everyone who was there.”
TODAY.com has reached out to Rosalía for comment.
Other fan videos from the concert show the singer performing, despite appearing to be in discomfort.

It’s unclear if Rosalía will make up the concert. She’s next scheduled to perform four dates in Madrid, beginning March 30 and is slated to continue touring through Europe before going to Miami on June 4 and 6 to kick off a North and South American leg.

title: Will There Be an 'Age of Attraction' Reunion? What to Know
summary: When is the Age of Attraction reunion? What day and time is it? How to watch and when it is.
story: The "Age of Attraction" finale saw four couples decide to continue with their relationships, despite significant age gaps, and one couple go their separate ways. Now, we'll find out who really stayed together after the cameras stopped rolling.
Luckily, we won't have to wait long for answers since Netflix just announced that an "Age of Attraction" Season 1 reunion special is on the way.
When will the reunion debut and how can you tune in? Here's everything we know so far.
When Is the 'Age of Attraction Season 1 Reunion?
The Season 1 "Age of Attraction" reunion will premiere on Wednesday, April 1 at 4 p.m. PT / 7 p.m. ET.
How to Watch the ‘Age of Attraction Season 1 Reunion

Typically, Netflix reunions air on the streaming service. This time, however, the “Age of Attraction” reunion will air as an episode of The Viall Files, aka the podcast of “Age of Attraction” host Nick Viall.
Viall's wife and "Age of Attraction" co-host Natalie Joy will also interview stars of the reality series during the special episode of the podcast.
Who Will Appear in the Reunion?
In addition to the five couples who made it to the Season 1 finale, viewers can also expect to see Vanelle and Jorge, who went their separate ways early on after moving in together.
However, a trailer for the reunion suggests that Pfeiffer, who committed to Derrick in the season finale, was not present for the reunion.
Here's a full list of the cast members who appear in the reunion:
